title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The bill AB 2424 seeks to protect homeowners during the foreclosure process, preventing them from losing home equity.
The bill AB 2863 enhances consumer protections by simplifying the process of canceling automatic subscription renewals.
The bill AB 1820 mandates that local jurisdictions provide transparent and accessible data on housing development fees.
The bill AB 2343 expands support for childcare programs, helping families experiencing homelessness or domestic violence.
The bill AB 2670 launches a public awareness campaign to provide medically accurate information on abortion access.
The bill AB 2637 expands the State Treasurer’s ability to provide loans to health facilities.
The bill AB 2999 addresses the student mental health crisis by requiring school boards to consider mental health and equity when setting homework guidelines.
The bill AB 2015 helps alleviate the nursing shortage by allowing nurses to obtain portable teaching credentials.
The bill AB 535 ensures that veterans' disability benefits are not counted as income for housing eligibility.
The bill AB 1994 establishes a position within the California Department of Veterans Affairs to advocate for minority and underrepresented veterans.
The bill AB 2499 enables employees who are victims of violence to take unpaid leave without fear of discrimination.
The bill AB 2086 requires Caltrans to improve its online dashboard for tracking transportation project alignment with California’s goals.
The bill AB 3074 prohibits schools from using derogatory terms as mascots.
The bill AB 1854 extends the time for reservists to apply for retroactive deferment of payment and interest on certain debts.
The bill AB 2943 strengthens penalties for shoplifting and allows certain thefts to be prosecuted as grand theft.
